name: Alex Chen
activities: HKU Robotics Team — Vice Captain, organised inter-university competition 2025 attended by 200 students
Undergraduate Research Assistant, Dept of Computer Science, HKU — machine learning applications in healthcare imaging
Volunteer developer at Code4HK — built community resource website for local NGO
HKU Engineering Society — Events Committee Member
Participant, HKUST Hackathon 2025 — 2nd place, AI track
cv_text: Alex Chen. Year 2 BEng Computer Science, HKU. CGPA 3.7. Vice Captain of HKU Robotics Team — led team of 8, organised inter-university robotics competition. Undergraduate Research Assistant in CSIS department working on machine learning applications in healthcare imaging. Volunteer developer at Code4HK building community resource platforms for NGOs. 2nd place HKUST Hackathon 2025 AI track. Dean's List 2024-25. Skills: Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, C++, React, Git.
